title: Admin Panel for Content Management with Filtering and Sorting

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Admin Panel for Content Management with Filtering and Sorting

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <path d='M 60 50 L 60 250' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
  <path d='M 140 50 L 140 250' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
  <path d='M 220 50 L 220 250' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
  <text x='30' y='60' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Categories</text>
  <text x='30' y='100' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Authors</text>
  <text x='120' y='140' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Posts</text>
  <text x='220' y='180' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Filter</text>
  <text x='30' y='220' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Search</text>
  <rect x='120' y='220' width='160' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='290' y='220' width='60' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must support filtering and sorting of blog posts by categories, authors, and dates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Admin Panel for Content Management with Filtering and Sorting

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive filtering, sorting, and pagination, as well as state updates.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, efficient state use, and use of Tailwind CSS utility classes.
